name: Infrastructure Delivery and Procurement Gates (FIDPM)
description: Stage-gate control framework for public infrastructure delivery and procurement per the National Treasury Framework for Infrastructure Delivery and Procurement Management. Each stage ends in a gate where the deliverable is approved before the next stage starts. Switches on the universal project-completeness rules today; stage-gate deliverable checks are on the roadmap.

stages.name: Design development
stages.gate_deliverable: Concept and viability / design development report

stages.name: Handover
stages.gate_deliverable: Handover certificate and operations or maintenance information

note: Stage names follow the National Treasury infrastructure delivery management stages. Confirm exact gate deliverables against the current FIDPM instruction note for your institution.
